# Backend test fixtures

The PhonePe parser tests in Phase 3 use a checked-in sample statement at
`phonepe_sample.pdf` as the canonical fixture. The Phase 1 PR scaffolds this
directory but **does not** include the PDF — that file is a hard prerequisite
for Phase 3 and is tracked separately.

When the sample arrives, drop it here as `phonepe_sample.pdf`. It should be
the same PDF referenced in `design/03-pdf-parser.md`.
